item.title: Attempting to Revive a Long-Abandoned Plane
item.description: A long-abandoned aircraft is inspected and worked on in hopes of bringing it back to life. What challenges come with restoring a forgotten plane?

media:content.media:title: Attempting to Revive a Long-Abandoned Plane
media:content.media:description: A long-abandoned aircraft is inspected and worked on in hopes of bringing it back to life. What challenges come with restoring a forgotten plane?

item.title: Road Trip Across Florida in an Old RV
item.description: An abandoned RV is taken on a journey across Florida, bringing unexpected challenges and memorable moments along the way. Would you take the trip?

media:content.media:title: Road Trip Across Florida in an Old RV
media:content.media:description: An abandoned RV is taken on a journey across Florida, bringing unexpected challenges and memorable moments along the way. Would you take the trip?

item.title: Replacing an Airplane Tire
item.description: A closer look at the process of replacing a tire on an aircraft, highlighting the tools and steps involved. What makes airplane maintenance so precise?

media:content.media:title: Replacing an Airplane Tire
media:content.media:description: A closer look at the process of replacing a tire on an aircraft, highlighting the tools and steps involved. What makes airplane maintenance so precise?

item.title: 37 Years Later: Can This Plane Fly Again?
item.description: An aircraft that has sat unused for decades is inspected and evaluated for a possible return to the skies. What does it take to revive a plane after 37 years?

media:content.media:title: 37 Years Later: Can This Plane Fly Again?
media:content.media:description: An aircraft that has sat unused for decades is inspected and evaluated for a possible return to the skies. What does it take to revive a plane after 37 years?

item.title: Buying a High-End Aircraft Engine
item.description: A closer look at the purchase of a high-end engine and the details that make it stand out. What factors matter most when choosing an engine?

media:content.media:title: Buying a High-End Aircraft Engine
media:content.media:description: A closer look at the purchase of a high-end engine and the details that make it stand out. What factors matter most when choosing an engine?

item.title: Abandoned plane with active residents
item.description: An abandoned plane reveals unexpected signs of ongoing activity and life inside. What stories could this unusual aircraft still hold?

media:content.media:title: Abandoned plane with active residents
media:content.media:description: An abandoned plane reveals unexpected signs of ongoing activity and life inside. What stories could this unusual aircraft still hold?
